description: Department of Labor graphic. The left half is a full-height color photograph of President Donald Trump walking forward in a dark navy suit, white shirt, red tie, and a small American flag lapel pin, against a blurred background of grass and the side of a helicopter (Marine One) at the White House. A large white serif headline at the top reads 'Trust TRUMP!' ('Trust' in italic, 'TRUMP!' in bold capitals). The right half stacks four torn-newspaper clippings, each with a news outlet logo and a headline: FOX BUSINESS - 'Trump administration prioritizes bolstering skilled trades workforce'; The Washington Times - 'Trump's aluminum and steel tariffs are working'; Bloomberg - 'No More Offshore. Startups Look to Spend and Hire in U.S. Due to Trump Tax Change.'; THE WALL STREET JOURNAL - 'Companies Tout More Investments, Orders From Trump's Tax Bill in Earnings Calls'. A small embossed seal sits at the bottom center.
notable_text: Trust TRUMP! | FOX BUSINESS: Trump administration prioritizes bolstering skilled trades workforce | The Washington Times: Trump's aluminum and steel tariffs are working | Bloomberg: No More Offshore. Startups Look to Spend and Hire in U.S. Due to Trump Tax Change. | THE WALL STREET JOURNAL: Companies Tout More Investments, Orders From Trump's Tax Bill in Earnings Calls
